assertion.name: The claim that ivermectin reduces COVID-19 mortality
assertion.statement: The proposition, assessed across the 2020-2022 ivermectin literature, that ivermectin treatment lowers mortality in COVID-19.
assertion.note: A TOPIC node (the shared subject of the positive syntheses AND the TOGETHER contrast) — deliberately NOT a provenance edge. Sharing a topic is not sharing an upstream: TOGETHER is about the same question yet derives from disjoint evidence, which is why it COMBINES while the three positive syntheses REFUSE.
